channel.title: cs.LG updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: Machine Learning (cs.LG) updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive

item.title: Scaling Laws for Neural Language Models. (arXiv:2001.08361)
item.description: We study empirical scaling laws for language model performance on the cross-entropy loss & show they hold over >7 orders of magnitude.
item.dc:creator: Jared Kaplan, Sam McCandlish

item.title: Attention Is All You Need. (arXiv:1706.03762)
item.description: The dominant sequence transduction models are based on complex recurrent or convolutional neural networks. We propose the Transformer.
item.dc:creator: Ashish Vaswani, Noam Shazeer

item.title: A Paper With No Link.
item.description: This item is missing a link and must be skipped with a warning.
item.dc:creator: Nobody
